candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and matches Net sales exactly across years; suitable as primary reported revenue label.
Not revenue; this is COGS.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; identical to Total Revenue across years, useful as fallback/priority alternative.

variables.notes: Use Total Revenue first, then Net sales as fallback if label changes by year. Do not sum.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct cost line matching COGS concept.

candidates.row_label: of which Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Subcomponent/of-which line, not the main COGS line.
Also a valid reported COGS line; identical to Cost of goods and services sold, useful as fallback.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, should be excluded when direct reported line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Selected the main direct cost line. Excluded identical alternate label and balancing/of-which rows to keep final choice minimal.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component.
Clear SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Other operating income and operating expenses
candidates.why: Mixed operating income/expense bucket; may include overhead but also includes income, so less clean.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

final_choice.row_label: Other operating income and operating expenses

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row is present. Chose best overhead buckets from income statement. Included Other operating income and operating expenses as closest remaining operating-overhead bucket despite mixed sign/income content; excluded depreciation/amortization, COGS, interest, taxes, and totals.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line on the income statement; best match.
Gross amount before capitalization, not the final expense if explicit R&D expense exists.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, excluded from R&D expense when direct R&D expense exists.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Explicit income statement R&D expense available; use only that line as priority item.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line that includes interest and FX; acceptable only as fallback if specific interest line missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and similar profit/ loss items
candidates.why: Most specific reported interest expense line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest subcomponent, not total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest subcomponent, not total interest expense.
Balancing row, should not be used when reported lines exist.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, should not be used when reported lines exist.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and similar profit/ loss items

variables.notes: Priority list: use specific interest expense first; Financial expenses second as broader fallback if needed in some years. Excluded lease-interest subcomponents and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Semantically right owner/parent equity label, but appears blank in preview; still present as row. However a clearer populated parent-equity total exists.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Explicit parent/shareholder equity excluding non-controlling interests; best match for BE.
Includes NCI and would risk double counting if MIB also mapped.
Balancing row, not appropriate.
Balancing row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to exclude NCI and avoid double counting with MIB. Included semantically similar parent-equity label as fallback if populated in other years.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet stock of minority interest.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet stock of minority interest.
Explicit balance sheet NCI line; best match.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful as fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels only, with Non-controlling interests first and Minority Interest as fallback.
